description: Enable admins to manage workspace membership and audit changes.

userStories.title: Add membership audit event persistence
userStories.description: As a compliance stakeholder, I want membership changes persisted as audit events so that admin actions are traceable.
acceptanceCriteria: Audit records store actor, target member, action type, role context, and timestamp
Audit records are created for invite, role change, and revoke actions
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Implement admin member invitation flow
userStories.description: As a workspace admin, I want to invite a member by email so that I can grant workspace access without direct database edits.
acceptanceCriteria: Admin can submit invite with email and initial role
System creates pending membership invite for valid email
Invite action creates a corresponding audit record
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Implement admin member role change action
userStories.description: As a workspace admin, I want to change a member role between viewer, editor, and admin so that permissions stay accurate.
acceptanceCriteria: Role change action allows viewer, editor, and admin values only
Updated role persists and is returned in member listing responses
Role change action creates an audit record
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Implement admin access revoke action
userStories.description: As a workspace admin, I want to revoke workspace access so that former collaborators are removed promptly.
acceptanceCriteria: Admin can revoke member access from workspace
Revoked member no longer appears as active workspace member
Revoke action creates an audit record
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Add membership management UI in workspace settings
userStories.description: As a workspace admin, I want settings controls for inviting, role updates, and revocation so that member management is self-serve.
acceptanceCriteria: Settings page includes invite form with email and role fields
Each member row supports role changes and revoke action
UI refreshes to reflect membership changes after successful actions
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill

userStories.title: Show recent membership changes in audit view
userStories.description: As a workspace admin, I want to review recent membership changes in settings so that I can verify who changed access and when.
acceptanceCriteria: Settings audit section lists recent membership events in reverse chronological order
Audit rows show actor, action, affected member, and timestamp
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill
